_seed_meta.description: University of Idaho research administration policies and procedures for sponsored funding - APM Chapter 45, OSP guidance, and related institutional resources for faculty, DGAs, and research administrators.

items.title: University of Idaho Office of Sponsored Programs
items.description: Knowledge base covering UI sponsored programs policies, procedures, and resources including APM Chapter 45 research administration policies, cost principles, effort reporting, subawards, and compliance guidance.
